title: Loki - Hidden Truths
hook_text: What they don't tell you about Loki...

slides.text: Loki had harmful intentions toward Thor... BEFORE he even knew he was adopted. His jealousy wasn't about heritage—it was pure sibling rivalry from the start.
That TVA tablet showing the year 3000... might be referencing a specific Marvel Comics timeline that hardcore fans instantly recognized.
Loki ruled Asgard for YEARS disguised as Odin... right under Thor's nose. The movies barely scratched the surface of how deep this deception went.
He confronted He Who Remains at the literal END OF TIME... and his choice there broke the entire Marvel multiverse wide open.
Loki debuted in 'Journey into Mystery' #85... and he literally IS the mystery of the title. The book was about Thor, but Loki became the central enigma.
Stan Lee and Jack Kirby created him in 1962... the same dream team that created the X-Men and the Avengers, but Loki predates most of them.

caption: Which fact surprised you most? 👇 #Loki

suggestions: Consider adding a slide that highlights Loki's redemption arc in the series to balance the negative aspects and engage a wider audience.
ai_review.rewrite_hook: What secrets about Loki are hiding in plain sight?
ai_review.rewrite_caption: Which of Loki's hidden truths shocked you the most? 🌪️ #Loki
